artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-02-10
artifacts.excerpt:
COGSEC TRIGGER WARNING

Don't continue reading if you are prone to paranoia

Might have discovered an interesting basilisk that loops in on itself to deliver its payload:

The VULNERABLE MIND HYPOTHESIS

This follows a similar structure as Bostrom's vulnerable world hypothesis (and also reminds of that Monty Python sketch about a joke so funny it's deadly). Here it is: 

0) Thoughts are like programs or viruses. They affect the cognitive system of their thinker/host in positive, neutral, or negative ways. The same thought has a different effect depending on the cognitive system of the hosts.

1) We can expect a (normal?) distribution of effects of thoughts where the vast majority have a neutral impact. However, there are outliers on both sides of that distribution, and the tail is long...
